title: clear suspicious stew 不谜的谜之炖菜
description: Show the effects of the suspicious stew, making the suspicious stew no longer confusing!  显示谜之炖菜的效果，让谜之炖菜不再令人迷惑！
body:
# Make the suspicious stew no longer confusing!
**This resource pack adds an effect icon to the top right corner of texture of the suspicious stew to show the effect of it.**


# 让谜之炖菜不再令人迷惑！
**这个资源包在谜之炖菜的纹理右上角增加了效果图标，显示谜之炖菜的效果。**
![沉船箱子](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8df45088819c293ca63b0a67e7de28bf9d20906d_0.webp)
![村民交易](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45cb93ebed787cf787c796bcf26c1b556d9a51d6.png)
![工作台合成](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8NXX3uuB/images/e8801b97bbfb27b1a63ddd13aa34da0759e4cec2.png)
![所有谜之炖菜](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e8cb669059348c7bd5785d7a229d0cde19efe3a.png)
